description:
Fedora Media Writer is a tool that helps users put Fedora images on their portable drives such as flash disks.


What's Changed
- Use Qt 6.10.2 for macOS and Windows builds
- Fixed UI reset when plugging in a device while writing (@Prachi194agrawal)
- Report step-by-step progress during drive restoration
- Fixed mediawriter --help starting the application
- Added missing options to mediawriter --help
- Added support for multi-device restoration (@gastoner)
Windows
- Easy installation of Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable from FMW installer (@gastoner)
- Auto-uninstall previous installation
- Fixed media check always failing (getting stuck at 4.8%)
- Improved reliability of device restoration
- Improved live image detection
macOS
- Improve detection of restorable devices
Linux
- Fixed live image not detected on startup
- Improved logging
